markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content performance, workflow, and future strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Blog sitemap is broken,** blocking new content from indexing; Relay's web manager is fixing it.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [**New content clusters approved** for Accountants & Bookkeepers (A\&B) and a Jan 2026 product launch, expanding audience and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [**Airtable workflow will be improved** with a custom interface or editor access to streamline Relay's review process.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [**A 2026 interactive "mini-site" concept** for the home services vertical was floated and received a positive response from GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)

## Topics

### Technical SEO: Sitemap & Indexing Issues

  - [**Problem:** The `blog` sitemap is broken, showing only \~400 pages and no content published since June.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
      - [**Impact:** New articles are not being indexed via the sitemap, making performance tracking difficult.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
      - [**Cause:** Likely related to the recent CMS migration.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [**Resolution:** Zoe has created a high-priority ticket for Relay's web manager, Gavin, to fix the sitemap.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
  - [**Interim Fix:** Zoe will manually request indexing for 3 unindexed articles via Google Search Console (GSC).](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Jakub lacks the necessary GSC permissions to use the "Inspect URL" tool.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)

### Workflow & Process Improvements

  - [**Problem:** The current Airtable workflow is inefficient for tracking content through Relay's internal and partner review cycles.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [**Solution:** Bailey will create a custom Airtable interface or grant editor access to streamline status updates.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [**Bug:** Internal links in recent articles incorrectly point to the staging domain (`web-staging.relay`).](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
      - [**Action:** Bailey will investigate the root cause and ensure all links are corrected.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)

### Content Strategy: New Clusters & Topics

  - [**Goal:** Increase content velocity before the holidays; new topics are needed beyond the current AI focus.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [**New Cluster 1: Accountants & Bookkeepers (A\&B)**](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
      - [**Audience:** Small business accountants and bookkeepers.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A key referral channel for new SMB clients. Content will focus on firm efficiency and how Relay helps their clients.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will conduct keyword research. Zoe will provide messaging docs from the A\&B team.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [**New Cluster 2: Financial Planning (for Jan 2026 Product Launch)**](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
      - [**Product:** An AI-based tool for SMBs to simulate cash flow scenarios.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
      - [**Differentiator:** Projects 8 weeks out vs. the 4-week industry standard.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will research topics around financial wellness and planning.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
      - [**Action:** Bethany will get product info (features, tentative launch date) from Margot.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will build a "content refresh" pipeline to update existing articles with mentions of the new product post-launch.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)

### 2026 Strategic Vision: Interactive Content

  - [**Concept:** An immersive, interactive "mini-site" for a specific vertical (e.g., home services).](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [**Features:** Deep-dive content, calculators, quizzes, and animations.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [**Goal:** Create a full-funnel experience from top-of-funnel discovery to registration.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [**Response:** GrowthX confirmed they have the capability and relevant examples from past clients.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Zoe:**](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
      - [Follow up with Gavin on the sitemap fix.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
      - [Manually request indexing for 3 unindexed articles in GSC.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
      - [Provide GrowthX with A\&B team messaging docs.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [**Bethany:**](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
      - [Get product info (features, launch date) for the Jan 2026 tool from Margot.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
      - [Resend CTA mockups to Zoe.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
      - [Investigate and fix the staging link bug.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
      - [Propose an Airtable workflow solution (custom interface or editor access).](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
      - [Conduct keyword research for the A\&B and Financial Planning clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
      - [Surface the 2026 interactive content concept to the relevant internal team (e.g., Kyle).](https://fathom.video/share/DACSCz1-7FwaSDzoyXUfxFvcUYjrfUpD?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)
